<mxGraphModel dx="1180" dy="760" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1180" pageHeight="760" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <mxCell id="title" value="magicsticky — architecture" style="text;html=1;fontSize=20;fontStyle=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="16" width="400" height="30" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="a_browser" value="Human Browser
(phone-first web app)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE0B2;strokeColor=#E65100;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="110" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="a_claude" value="Claude / LLM
(custom MCP connector)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE0B2;strokeColor=#E65100;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="360" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="a_google" value="Google OAuth
(identity provider)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFE0B2;strokeColor=#E65100;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="40" y="600" width="180" height="60" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="flyapp" value="Fly app · Bun · port 8080" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontStyle=1;fontSize=13;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="90" width="800" height="520" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="hono" value="Hono router
src/app.ts" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="flyapp"><mxGeometry x="20" y="40" width="360" height="300" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="r_spa" value="GET /* → React SPA (web/dist)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="hono"><mxGeometry x="16" y="36" width="328" height="28" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="r_auth" value="POST /auth/google (no auth → issues session)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="hono"><mxGeometry x="16" y="72" width="328" height="28" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="r_api" value="/api/* (session cookie)
list · read · save(CAS) · share · undo · connector-token · export · delete-everything" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="hono"><mxGeometry x="16" y="108" width="328" height="56" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="r_mcp" value="/mcp (Bearer token · Streamable HTTP)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="hono"><mxGeometry x="16" y="172" width="328" height="28" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="mcp" value="MCP server · src/mcp.ts
(stateless, per-request)" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="flyapp"><mxGeometry x="420" y="40" width="360" height="130" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="t_whoami" value="whoami
(read shared)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="mcp"><mxGeometry x="14" y="46" width="80" height="68" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="t_write" value="write
(CAS)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="mcp"><mxGeometry x="102" y="46" width="80" height="68" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="t_list" value="list_stickies
(metadata only)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="mcp"><mxGeometry x="190" y="46" width="80" height="68" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="t_share" value="set_shared
(flip flag)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="mcp"><mxGeometry x="278" y="46" width="80" height="68" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="authgrp" value="Auth / Crypto" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#BBDEFB;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="flyapp"><mxGeometry x="420" y="200" width="360" height="130" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="c_session" value="session.ts
HMAC cookie" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="authgrp"><mxGeometry x="14" y="40" width="104" height="74" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="c_http" value="server-http.ts
JWT verify + allowlist
+ token resolve" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="authgrp"><mxGeometry x="128" y="40" width="104" height="74" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="c_crypto" value="crypto.ts
AES-256-GCM
(user_id as AAD)" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="authgrp"><mxGeometry x="242" y="40" width="104" height="74" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="store" value="Store · src/db.ts
bun:sqlite (WAL)" style="shape=cylinder3;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#C8E6C9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="flyapp"><mxGeometry x="20" y="360" width="360" height="140" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="tbl_sticky" value="sticky
text · prev_text · is_shared (unique/user)
version (CAS) · key_id · position" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="store"><mxGeometry x="18" y="54" width="324" height="42" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="tbl_account" value="account
google_sub · email · connector_token_hash" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFFFF;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=10;" vertex="1" parent="store"><mxGeometry x="18" y="100" width="324" height="32" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_b_auth" value="HTTPS · Google ID token" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="a_browser" target="r_auth"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_b_api" value="HTTPS REST · session cookie (CAS on write)" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="a_browser" target="r_api"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_b_spa" value="HTML/JS · React bundle" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;dashed=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="r_spa" target="a_browser"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_c_mcp" value="Streamable HTTP · Bearer token" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="a_claude" target="r_mcp"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_mcp_srv" value="per-request" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="r_mcp" target="mcp"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_mcp_store" value="version CAS" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="mcp" target="store"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_api_store" value="version CAS" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="r_api" target="store"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_auth_store" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="authgrp" target="store"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="e_http_google" value="HTTPS · jwks JWT verify" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;fontSize=10;" edge="1" parent="1" source="c_http" target="a_google"><mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/></mxCell> <mxCell id="note" value="Invariants: stateless MCP · optimistic version CAS lets human + Claude edit safely · list_stickies is metadata-only (privacy boundary) · AES-256-GCM at rest (user_id as AAD) · single-machine scale (SQLite on Fly volume /data)." style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#9E9E9E;fontSize=11;" vertex="1" parent="1"><mxGeometry x="320" y="630" width="800" height="90" as="geometry"/></mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>

g.text: list · read · save(CAS) · share · undo · token · export · delete
· stateless MCP · optimistic version CAS lets human + Claude edit safely · list_stickies is metadata-only (privacy)
· AES-256-GCM at rest (user_id as AAD) · single-machine scale: SQLite on Fly volume /data
Frontend: web/ (React 19 + Vite) — dev :5180 proxies /api + /auth → :3000; built into web/dist, served by Hono in prod.
